title: Transcript:Remnant
wikitext:
{{Transcript|scenery}}
{{Transcript list|Sliske|The Whisperer}}

==Palace==
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' What are you saying?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' The initial incident may not have been contained as well as we'd hoped.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' You assured me that all appropriate measures were taken!
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' We're talking about an unprecedented event here! All experts on the totem were lost. We had to make assumptions!
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' How bad are we talking?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' A pair of civilians.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Just the two?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' That we know of.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Then make sure it stays that way. From this point on, there can be no more mistakes.
* {{tact|end}}

==Residential District==
===Pub (upper floor)===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Are you ready, my child?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' I... I think so.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' He has doubts.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' No! It's just...
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Do not be afraid, my child, for you are not alone. Your voice will be one of thousands, singing an eternal silence.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' What do I need to do?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Seek out our divine order in the cistern below. They will guide you across the waves.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Go now, and keep our icon close, for it marks you as one of the chosen. Without it, you are forsaken.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Okay... I'll go right away!
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' And so another voice joins the Silent Choir.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' He is afraid. He is not ready.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' It matters not. The day of ascension approaches. His fear will be washed away by the endless sea...
* {{tact|end}}

===East of Ketla's house===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Do you think they'll ever let us leave?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Of course! Those foolish Saradominists think they've won. We'll wait until they let their guard down, then rise up and retake our fortress!
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' Ha! You are naive, child. The Empire is done. At best, we will live out our lives in secret down here. At worst, the Saradominists will find us and slaughter us all.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' You're lying! The Empty Lord will protect us!
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' The Empty Lord is gone! He will not answer your prayers!
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' You speak the words of a traitor!
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' I speak reason. Someone around here needs to!
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Hey! Where are you going?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' I have to get out! I can't live my life down here! I have to find a way out!
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' No! Wait!
* {{tact|end}}

==Science District==
===East side of furnace building===
''Mysterious Voice 4 has the silhouette of [[the Whisperer]].''
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' What is it? What's happening?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' The undercity is being sealed. They say the fortress has fallen.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' Sealed? On whose orders?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Well... yours.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' I gave no such order. Round up the centurions! We have a traitor among us.
* '''Mysterious Voice 4:''' No.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' You! This was your doing!
* '''Mysterious Voice 4:''' You have served your Empire well, High Magister, but that servitude is at an end. Now it is time for a new one to begin.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' By the Empty Lord!
* {{tact|end}}

===Furnace building===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' ...The requested ores. Fourty{{sic}} rune and adamant.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Thank you. Do you have a moment? An extra set of hands would be of great help.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Of course, though I have no knowledge of the process.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' A learning opportunity then. Chromium is one of our most significant discoveries. With it we have elevated the empire. It behoves us all to know how it is made.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' What do I need to do?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' I will insert the ores. That device, there, allows the air that flows into the furnace to be regulated. Pull it gently.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:'''  Watch where the adamant and the rune meet. We are looking for a silvery sheen.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' ...
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Is that it?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Yes. Half-way down now.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' The ores are... mixing?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Not quite. Melting rune and adamant would normally result in a simple blend. Now, pull it all the way down.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' But with the right amount of heat, pressure and air... There. Chromium. Alloyed rune and adamant.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Fascinating... That felt quite easy.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Chromium lies at the heart of Lassar. It is in our golems, our lights, even our walls. We have invested a lot to make producing it 'easy'. It was not always this way...
* '''Player:''' Rune, adamant and a furnace that can regulate air intake... The Blast Furnace in Keldagrim could work...
* {{tact|end}}

===South-west building===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Did you see it? That thing in the science district?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' I did. What do you think it was?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' I don't know, but it was... beautiful, don't you think?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Beautiful? Not sure I'd describe a pillar as beautiful.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' That was no pillar. It was something far more. I need to get a closer look.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Are you okay? You're acting very odd.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' I'm fine. I just... I just need to see it again.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Right... Maybe it's best if I just leave you to it.
* {{tact|end}}

==Sealed remnants==
''The sealed remnants are always initially shown to the player in the following order, regardless of which one is initially viewed. Mysterious Voice 2 has the silhouette of [[Sliske]].''

===First===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' What am I looking at here?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' An answer.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' To what question?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' What lies beyond?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' You don't mean...?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Yes.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Where was it found?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' The dwarves of Acheron uncovered it. They lost their home as a result.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' They fled south, but some remained under its control. They brought it with them.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' What became of these dwarves?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' They succumbed. It had no further use for them.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Could it do the same to us?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' I have shielded it. It will do you no harm.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Then we'd better not waste time. There are resources that can be diverted, though there will be pushback.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' It will be dealt with. My companion will remain to oversee your research. She will ensure that you face no barriers.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' I see... I'll ensure work begins at once.
* {{tact|end}}

===Second===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' You've returned. I was starting to think you never would.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Your work does not require my presence.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Of course, it's just that your expertise would greatly benefit our research.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' You have been provided with expertise.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Forgive me, it's just...
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' You take issue with her?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' She makes the scientists uncomfortable.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Yes... I can imagine. Their discomfort will drive their work.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Well... As you wish.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Now, what do you have?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' The totem seems to act as a conduit between our world and the Shadow Realm. In theory, it could be used to harvest energy from there.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' In theory?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Well we've not tried it, of course. The risks...
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Will be managed.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' I... Of course. We'll make preparations.
* {{tact|end}}

===Third===
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' There has been a development.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Good. Then you are making progress?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Well... In a way, but the move to direct tests has come with... complications.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Explain.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Some of the volunteers needed... neutralising.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Progress requires sacrifice.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Yes, but... after doing so, they came back. It's like the totem reanimated them, but this was no normal necromancy.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' They weren't just mindless husks... It's like... they were still in there.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Their souls remained?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' It would seem so. They spoke as well.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' What did they speak of?
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Seas, curses and something called blackstone. It didn't really make much sense.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Curious... Explore this area further.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' But if news gets out...
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Ensure it does not.
* {{tact|end}}

===Fourth===
''Mysterious Voice 3 has the silhouette of [[the Whisperer]].''
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Is it true?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' The enemy marches on Lassar.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Are they after the totem?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' It destroyed their home. Perhaps they wish to destroy it in return.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' We should relocate it.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' No. The work will continue.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' But...
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' You have preparations to make. I would speak to my companion. Alone.
* '''Mysterious Voice 1:''' Of course.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' The dwarves have allied with Saradomin. Their strength is too great. Lassar will fall.
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Have the undercity sealed, then remove the protections on the totem. We require a more thorough test.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' And the researchers?
* '''Mysterious Voice 2:''' Their work is complete. Do with them as you wish.
* '''Mysterious Voice 3:''' It will be done.
* {{tact|end}}
